title: ModusToolbox Application
description: Logical shape of a ModusToolbox application as defined by its top-level Makefile, .mtbx project file, and dependent .mtb component manifests. Captures the fields a tool such as Project Creator or Library Manager would read.

name.description: Application name as set by APPNAME in the Makefile.

target.description: ModusToolbox BSP target identifier, e.g. APP_CY8CKIT-062S2-43012 or APP_CY8CPROTO-062-4343W.

core.description: Target Arm core executing the application image.

toolchain.description: Compiler toolchain configured for the build.

deviceFamily.description: Cypress/Infineon device family the application is built for.

components.description: ModusToolbox COMPONENTS list selected at build time (e.g. FREERTOS, BSP_DESIGN_MODUS).

libraries.description: Resolved .mtb library dependencies from deps/ entries.

configurators.description: ModusToolbox configurator files referenced by the application.

defines.description: Preprocessor symbols pushed into the build via DEFINES.
